retry_reason: After kmem_cache_destroy succeeds, the cache is freed; retrying would cause use-after-free or double-free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that destroys the global 'extent_map_cache' slab cache by releasing its underlying reference. It must be called exactly once during the module/subsystem exit path to clean up the cache. After this call, the cache is no longer available and must not be used. No return value to check; the operation always succeeds if the cache exists. There are no locking or RCU requirements because the caller is expected to be in a safe context (e.g., module exit) where no concurrent allocations from this cache are active.
